scripts.build: pnpm run icons && tsc -b && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter @nerve/web build && pnpm --filter @nerve/orchestrator build && pnpm --filter @nerve/desktop build && node scripts/start-electron.mjs
scripts.build:package: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter @nerve/web build && pnpm --filter @nerve/orchestrator build && pnpm --filter @nerve/desktop build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.package:linux: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter @nerve/web build && pnpm --filter @nerve/orchestrator build && pnpm --filter @nerve/desktop build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm --publish never
